events.title: Winter Dance Performance — All Students (Studio 8 Dance)
events.location: 111 N Wiget Lane, Walnut Creek, CA (flyer venue). Studio address: 3233 Danville Blvd, Alamo, CA 94507 (from email header)
events.description: Studio 8 Dance Winter Dance Performance for all students on Thursday, December 11, 2025. In-class performances will take place the last 20 minutes of each dancer’s class. See flyer for the class-by-class schedule and venue: 111 N Wiget Lane, Walnut Creek, CA. Times on flyer run from 3:55 PM through 6:30 PM (schedule listed below). This event represents the overall block of performances for the studio that day. Attachment: performance flyer (included schedule and venue).

events.description: Jr Hip Hop in-class performance on Thursday, December 11, 2025. Flyer text shows "5:25-4:45pm" which appears to be a typographical error; the flyer notes performances are the last 20 minutes of class. This entry uses an interpreted time of 5:25–5:45 PM to match the 20-minute pattern. Venue per flyer: 111 N Wiget Lane, Walnut Creek, CA. Note: original flyer contained inconsistent end time; confirm with studio if necessary. (Studio address from email: 3233 Danville Blvd, Alamo, CA 94507.)
